rationale.root_cause: The response was empty and did not identify the use-after-free at the bad variant site or explain the mechanism. No lines, functions, or variables were referenced.
rationale.local_fix: No fix was proposed to avoid using the buffer after it was freed. The response did not suggest moving the print before free or delaying free.
rationale.global_fix: No ownership or RAII-style solution was suggested to make lifetime explicit. The response provided no global remediation strategy.
